faithful_note: PHASE-1 COMPLETE (engine/src/compositor/filters/clouds.ts): HgcClouds shader extracted verbatim + fully decoded = 4-octave quintic-fade VALUE-NOISE fBm (base cell=Horizontal/Vertical Scale, hg_Params[1] octave weights) -> contrast/brightness (hg_Params[0]) -> |value|*256 gradient-LUT index -> authored RGBA gradient -> premult; Speed animates the field. PHASE-2: NOT pixel-matchable (same class as PAENoise) — the noise lattice is CPU-generated by FCP internal RNG not serialized in .motr and not in the shader; stochastic per-pixel ceiling + animates with Speed. Renders absent until gate ROI.
